name: Devils
goal: Rebuild the Underworld population using the Evil Piece system and maintain the three-way peace treaty.
fact: Following the devastating loss of the original Satans and a massive population decline in the Great War, this faction shifted to a democratic meritocracy. They created the Evil Piece system to reincarnate talented humans into Devils.

name: Heaven
goal: Maintain the stability of the world's religious system, manage the Brave Saint system, and foster global peace.
fact: Since the death of the Biblical God in the ancient Great War, Heaven has been governed by the Archangel Michael. To fix their population issue, they adapted the Devils' system into the Brave Saint system using holy playing cards to reincarnate humans into Angels.

name: Grigori
goal: Study and catalog all existing Sacred Gears while protecting the peace established by the Three Factions treaty.
fact: Grigori was founded by the angels who fell from Heaven due to succumbing to human desires. Under Azazel's guidance, they transformed from a military organization into a research institution heavily focused on Sacred Gear mechanics.

name: Khaos Brigade
goal: Gather the strongest forces across all mythologies to overthrow the current peace and defeat Great Red.
fact: An umbrella organization of terrorists formed by using the Dragon God Ophis as a figurehead to attract powerful, disgruntled individuals from various mythologies. It was divided into several sub-factions based on the personal goals of its leaders.

name: Hero Faction
goal: Prove the worth and absolute potential of humanity by defeating supernatural monsters and gods.
fact: A prominent sub-faction of the Khaos Brigade consisting entirely of human Sacred Gear users who claim descent from historical heroes. They utilized the Holy Grail's power to artificially evolve their abilities and cause massive crises in Kyoto and the Underworld.
